data.name: 虛域傳說 - 第1卷
data.detailed_description:
《虛域傳說 - 第1卷》是一款劇情驅動的成人視覺小說。故事發生在一個都市奇幻世界，融合了現代世界與魔法、奇幻生物和超自然元素等奇幻元素。

第一卷講述了亞歷山大·卡利斯特（名字可更改）以及他如何發現名爲「虛域」的隱祕世界的故事。


你過着平凡的生活。

你在城郊長大，父母總是無微不至地照顧你和妹妹。

畢業後，你找了一份普通的工作。

現在，你正在事業場上努力奮鬥晉升，過着職場生活。

然而，這一切在你接到母親的電話後徹底改變。你發現，你一直以來深信不疑的一切，都不過是虛幻的假象。

你突然置身於一個你一直以爲只存在於小說或電影中的世界。

你將如何應對這全新的局面，這全新的世界，你將信任誰，又將遠離誰... 這一切都取決於你。

搶先體驗版已經包含圖片畫廊、過場動畫畫廊、成就功能，每章節末尾還有一個概要對你所做出的決定進行總結。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11 (64 Bit)
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

data.name: The Neverwhere Tales - Book 1
data.detailed_description:
The Neverwhere Tales - Book 1 is a story-driven Adult Visual Novel. The story takes place in an urban fantasy setting and combines a modern world with cyberpunk and fantasy elements like magic, magical creatures, and supernatural elements.

Book 1 is the story of Alexander Callister (first name can be changed) and how he learns about this hidden world called "Neverwhere."

You live a normal life.
You grew up on the outskirts of the city with parents who were always there for you and your sister.

After finishing school, you applied for a normal job.
Now you're working your way up the career ladder and living the corporate life.

That all changes one day when you get a call from your mother. You learn that all you believed in as true was a facade.

You're confronted with a world you always thought of as fiction or movie material.
How you deal with this new situation, this new world, who you trust or not... that is up to you.

The early access version already comes with an image gallery, a cinematics gallery, achievement functionality, and a chapter summary at the end summarizing the decisions you made.
